sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Float64, description String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 0.1, 'First entry'), (2, -0.5, 'Second entry'), (3, 2.3, 'Third entry');
SELECT logTrace(CAST('-' AS String) || toString(value)) FROM test_table WHERE value < 0;
SELECT logTrace(CAST(-value AS String) || ' processed') FROM test_table WHERE created_at < now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT logTrace('Result: ' || CAST(SUM(-value) AS String)) FROM (SELECT id, -value AS neg_value FROM test_table) AS subquery HAVING neg_value < 0;
SELECT logTrace(CONCAT('Total entries: ', toString(COUNT(*)))) FROM test_table;
SELECT logTrace('Max Value: ' || toString(MAX(-value))) FROM test_table WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT logTrace('Negative Values: ' || CAST(COUNT() AS String)) FROM test_table WHERE value < 0 GROUP BY id HAVING id > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT *, logTrace(CONCAT('Entry ', id, ' with neg value ', toString(-value))) FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (4, NULL, 'Fourth entry');
SELECT logTrace('Rows with NULL: ' || CAST(COUNT(*) AS String)) FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NULL;
SELECT logTrace('Average: ' || toString(AVG(value))) FROM (SELECT -value FROM test_table) HAVING AVG(value) > 0;
